common.tagline: A communal digital journal for Theory of Knowledge
common.flagged: Flagged — the teacher will take a look.
common.confirmDelete: Delete permanently? This cannot be undone.
common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Teacher dashboard
dashboard.noStudents: No students yet — invite them from the Students page.
dashboard.completionNote: Completion = assignments where the student posted their response and replied to enough classmates, across their year group's assignments with deadlines.

auth.signInIntro: Enter your school email and we will send you a sign-in link. No password needed.
auth.googleError: Couldn't start Google sign-in. Is the Google provider enabled in Supabase?
auth.errorExisting: This email already has an account. Sign in with your email code or password instead.
auth.magicLinkSent: Check your inbox — your sign-in link is on its way.
auth.checkEmailBody: We sent a sign-in code (and a link) to {email}.
auth.codeHint: Enter the 6-digit code below to sign in on THIS device — even if you opened the email on your phone.
auth.codeError: That code didn't work or has expired. Request a new one.
auth.linkAlso: Or, on this device, just open the link in the email.
auth.orPassword: Or sign in with a password
auth.errorDeactivated: This account has been deactivated. Please talk to your teacher.
auth.errorNoAccount: No account found for this email. Ask your teacher for an invite.
auth.errorInvalid: That didn't work — please check your details and try again.
auth.signedOutIdle: You were signed out after 30 minutes of inactivity. Sign in again to continue.
auth.privateNotice: This is a private classroom space. Access by invitation only.

invite.title: Join {appName}
invite.intro: You have been invited to your class's private TOK journal. Tell us your name to finish setting up.
invite.nameHint: As your teacher and classmates should see it.
invite.passwordHint: You can always sign in with an email link instead. Minimum 8 characters.
invite.invalidAccepted: This invite has already been used. Try signing in instead.
invite.invalidExpired: This invite has expired. Ask your teacher to send a new one.
invite.invalidUnknown: This invite link is not valid. Ask your teacher to send a new one.
invite.checkEmail: Almost there — check your inbox for a sign-in link.

home.noPosts: Nothing here yet. Your teacher's first assignment will appear here.
home.noPostsTeacher: No assignments yet. Create your first one with “+ New assignment”.

groups.title: Groups
groups.noPosts: No posts in this group yet.

post.dueHint: Leave empty for posts without deadlines (e.g. Coffee Corner).
post.alreadyResponded: You have posted your response. Now reply to at least {count} classmates.
post.cohortHint: Only this year group sees the assignment. Choose “All grades” to share it with everyone.

comments.hiddenOwn: This contribution is hidden — only you and the teacher can see it.
comments.editWindowNote: You can edit your own posts for 30 minutes.
comments.micDenied: Microphone access was blocked. Check your browser permissions.
comments.empty: No responses yet. Be the first!

participation.title: Participation
participation.intro: Per assignment: did each student post their own response and reply to at least {count} classmates?
participation.noAssignments: No assignments with this filter yet.

poll.heading: Poll
poll.optionsHint: One option per line — at least two.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.reminderResponse: Reminder: your response to “{title}” is due in 24 hours
notifications.reminderReplies: Reminder: your peer replies on “{title}” are due in 24 hours

settings.title: Settings
settings.avatarHint: An optional photo or image shown next to your name. Square images look best.
settings.inAppNote: In-app notifications are always on; these settings only control emails.
settings.passwordHint: Set a password if you prefer not to use email links. Minimum 8 characters.

students.title: Students
students.inviteHint: Paste one or more email addresses — separated by commas, spaces or new lines.
students.inviteLink: Invite link — copy it and send it to the student yourself if email sending isn't set up:
students.eraseWarning: This permanently deletes {name}'s account, all their responses, comments, reactions and uploaded files (GDPR erasure). This cannot be undone.
students.eraseConfirmLabel: Type the student's email to confirm
students.erased: Account and all associated data erased.
students.eraseErrorConfirm: The email you typed doesn't match this student's email. Nothing was deleted.
students.eraseErrorErase: Couldn't erase the account (the server couldn't delete the login). Check that SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY is the service_role key, then try again.
students.noStudents: No students yet — send your first invites above.

privacy.title: Privacy — in plain language
body: This is the private discussion space of our TOK class. Only invited members — your teacher and your classmates — can see anything posted here. Nothing is public, and search engines are told to stay away.

What we store about you: your name, your school email address, and the things you choose to post (responses, comments, reactions, voice recordings and files). That's it. No tracking pixels, no analytics, no advertising, no profiling.
Where it lives: all data is stored in the European Union (Supabase, EU region). Emails are sent through Resend solely to deliver sign-in links and the notifications you have switched on.

How long we keep it: until you leave the class. You can edit your own contributions for 30 minutes after posting. If you (or your parents) want everything gone, tell your teacher: erasure removes your account, every post, comment, reaction and file you uploaded — permanently.
Who to ask: your teacher is the data controller for this space. Questions or requests (access, correction, erasure) go directly to them, in person or by email.

invite.subject: You're invited to {appName}
invite.body: Your teacher has invited you to the class's private TOK journal. Click the link below to set up your account:
invite.expiry: This link works for {days} days and only for {email}.

newAssignment.subject: New assignment: {title}
newAssignment.body: A new assignment was posted in {group}:

reminderResponse.subject: Due tomorrow: your response to “{title}”
reminderResponse.body: Friendly reminder — your own response to “{title}” is due {date}. You haven't posted yet.

reminderReplies.subject: Due tomorrow: peer replies on “{title}”
reminderReplies.body: Friendly reminder — replies to at least {count} classmates on “{title}” are due {date}. You're at {done} of {count}.
